reviews.comment:
Soy Socia del ACA y es una làstima que no resuelvan el tema del "estacionamiento" desde hace años..
Pocos plateros y eso hace la atención lenta, pero predispuesta.
En el Serviclub buena atención.
Falta variedad de cosas.

(Translated by Google)
I'm an ACA member and it's a shame they haven't resolved the parking issue for years. There are too few cashiers, which makes service slow, but they are helpful. The service at the Serviclub is good. They lack variety in their offerings.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxNGEybE1BEAE

reviews.comment:
Dos estrellas, re lerdo el posnet, me demoré más para pagar que cargar

(Translated by Google)
Two stars, the POS terminal was incredibly slow, it took me longer to pay than to load the card.
